message.content:
Explore the rewardprogram repository at /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram

TASK: Map the current structure of the rewardprogram repository to understand what has already been migrated.

1. List all directories under src/
2. List all screens under src/screens/
3. List all services under src/services/
4. Check if there's a src/store/ directory and list its contents
5. Check src/atomic/ structure
6. Check src/redux/ structure (legacy)

Return a complete directory tree showing what currently exists in rewardprogram.
